class.name: VirtualButton
class.description: [VirtualButton] behaves like a standard button but emits [InputEventVirtualButton] events associated with a specific virtual button index. It supports textures for various states (normal, pressed, hovered, disabled) and various stretch modes.

members.member: The virtual button index this control triggers (e.g., 0 for Button 0, 1 for Button 1).
The text displayed on the button.
An optional icon displayed on the button.
An optional font override for the button text.
An optional font size override for the button text.
If [code]true[/code], the node's size will not be automatically adjusted to the texture size.
Controls how the texture is stretched or placed to fit the node's bounding rect.
Texture displayed when the button is disabled.
Texture displayed when the button has focus.
Texture displayed when the mouse hovers over the button.
Texture displayed when the button is pressed.

constants.constant: Scale the texture to fit the rectangle.
Tile the texture inside the rectangle.
Keep the texture's original size, centered in the rectangle.
Scale to fit while keeping aspect ratio.
Scale to fit keeping aspect ratio, centered.
Scale to cover the rectangle keeping aspect ratio.
